 {'date': '2026-03-12 23:21:01',
  'headline': 'Allogene (ALLO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript',
  'publisher': 'Motley Fool',
  'summary': 'David Chang: As we close 2025 and enter what we expect to be a '
             'defining year for Allogene Therapeutics, Inc., the environment '
             'around us is shifting.  Cell therapy has entered a phase defined '
             'by evidence, where progress will be measured not by speculation '
             'and promises, but by data and disciplined execution.  This is a '
             'year of critical proof points—proof points that could validate '
             'our allogeneic platform not merely as an alternative but as the '
             'imperative path to making cell therapy scalable, accessible, and '
             'deliverable at biologic-like scale.',
  'url': 'https://www.fool.com/earnings/call-transcripts/2026/03/12/allogene-allo-q4-2025-earnings-call-transcript/'},
